name: nowui-extension
description: Syntax highlighting and diagnostics for .nowui files, via the nowui-lsp language server.

nowui.serverPath.description: Path to the nowui-lsp executable. Leave empty to auto-detect target/debug or target/release under the open workspace's root, falling back to PATH (e.g. after `cargo install --path nowui-lsp`).

scripts.package:win32-x64: npm run stage-lsp && vsce package --target win32-x64
scripts.package:win32-arm64: npm run stage-lsp && vsce package --target win32-arm64
scripts.package:linux-x64: npm run stage-lsp && vsce package --target linux-x64
scripts.package:linux-arm64: npm run stage-lsp && vsce package --target linux-arm64
scripts.package:darwin-x64: npm run stage-lsp && vsce package --target darwin-x64
scripts.package:darwin-arm64: npm run stage-lsp && vsce package --target darwin-arm64
